title: QUIC RFC 8999 Invariants Work Item
completion_notes: Optional implementation notes, deviations, or follow-up items.
out_of_scope: Protocol behavior that does not affect the shared RFC 8999 wire shape.
summary:
Keep the RFC 8999 packet-invariant surface, tests, and evidence wiring aligned
with the canonical requirements and their overlapping RFC 9000 neighbors.
verification_plan:
Prove the slice through unit tests, property tests, fuzz tests, benchmark
coverage, and repo-local JSON validation and quality evidence passes.
planned_changes:
- Keep the packet-form discriminator strict in
  [QuicPacketParser](../../../src/Incursa.Quic/QuicPacketParser.cs).
- Preserve the packet-specific parsing model in the long-header and
  version-negotiation packet types.
- Keep the property, fuzz, and regression tests aligned with the shared wire
  shape and the dual-tagged RFC 8999 / RFC 9000 overlap cases.
- Keep benchmark coverage for the parsing and formatting hot paths in place.
- Keep the repo-local quality evidence and validation surfaces able to discover the
  requirement traits for this slice.
